data.title: 国际服小游戏「Find the Ball」
data.summary: [Event Notice] Summer has finally started in Kivotos! Participate in the Find the Ball mini game eve
data.body:
[Event Notice]

Summer has finally started in Kivotos!
Participate in the Find the Ball mini game everyday and earn gifts like Pyroxenes and Artifact Choice Tickets!

🗓️Event Period: 1/17 (Tue) After Maintenance - 2/5 (Sun) 2:59 AM (UTC)

#BlueArchive
